title: Input Reading, Tokenization, Command Registry, and Dispatch
description: The loop assumes every read succeeds, splits arguments inconsistently, indexes missing tokens, hard-codes a growing switch, and cannot test dispatch without real stdin and stdout. Learners cumulatively produce deterministic command parser and injected dispatcher through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose bufio.Reader or Scanner from line-size, token, error, cancellation, and testability requirements and configure any explicit limit.
Normalize line endings and whitespace under a documented grammar without corrupting names or silently accepting extra arguments.
Validate required, optional, repeated, missing, and extra arguments before handler access and return actionable usage.
